userMessage: Add delay measurement from CH4 rising to CH2 crossing 250mV and from CH4 rising to CH3 crossing 500mV

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Generated Flow","description":"Common TekAutomate scope flow built server-side.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"2","type":"write","label":"Clear existing measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}},{"id":"3","type":"group","label":"Add delay measurements","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"d1","type":"group","label":"Add delay measurement CH4 to CH2","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"d1_1","type":"write","label":"Add delay measurement CH4 to CH2 (1/5)","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS DELAY;MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOUrce1 CH4"}},{"id":"d1_2","type":"write","label":"Add delay measurement CH4 to CH2 (2/5)","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOUrce2 CH2;MEASUrement:MEAS1:DELay:EDGE1 RISe"}},{"id":"d1_3","type":"write","label":"Add delay measurement CH4 to CH2 (3/5)","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:DELay:EDGE2 RISe;MEASUrement:MEAS1:REFLevels2:METHod ABSolute"}},{"id":"d1_4","type":"write","label":"Add delay measurement CH4 to CH2 (4/5)","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:REFLevels2:ABSolute:RISELow 0.25;MEASUrement:MEAS1:REFLevels2:ABSolute:RISEMid 0.25"}},{"id":"d1_5","type":"write","label":"Add delay measurement CH4 to CH2 (5/5)","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:REFLevels2:ABSolute:RISEHigh 0.25"}}]}]},{"id":"4","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
